creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 205538
update net-im/py-matrix-synapse to 1.1.0

The following diff should upgrade py-matrix-synapse to 1.1.0. It basically bumps the version number and dependencies, adding a new dependency on dns/py-idna in the process. Starting w/ 1.0.0, the the Jinja2 and bleach dependencies are mandatory deps and I've updated the port to reflect these changes. This obsoletes the EMAIL option of the port. 

Any feedback is, of course, welcome. It seems to work fine on my homeserver. :)
